meaning: n.成员,会员,议员,(人或动,植物的)一部分,[语]子句,成分,[逻]推论的命题
examples: She is a life member of the club.
He's a member of several London clubs.
How much does it cost to become a member?
Norway, which is not an EU member, has had a 40% quota since 2003.
Born in Milton Keynes, England, Barnett is a member of the National Association of Black Journalists.
